parameters.subject: =[{{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.ticketId }}] We've received your request: {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.issueSummary.slice(0, 60) }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.customerName || 'there' }},

Thanks for contacting support. Your request has been received and a ticket has been created:

  Ticket ID:  {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.ticketId }}
  Summary:    {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.issueSummary }}
  Status:     Open
  Est. first response: within {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.slaHours }} business hours

Our {{ $('Validate & Normalize').item.json.assignedTeam }} team is on it. Reply to this email to add details - your reply will attach to the same ticket.

- Support Team (automated confirmation)
